title: EATF — Agent Evidence Package (AEP) reference verifiers
description: Open reference implementation for creating and offline-verifying Agent Evidence Packages (.aep): independent TypeScript and Python verifiers, offline sign/verify/inspect CLIs, JSON schemas, and a conformance test-vector suite with negative controls. Hybrid RSA-4096 + ML-DSA-65 (FIPS 204) signatures and RFC 3161 timestamps. Not an eIDAS trust service; offline, self-contained.
notes: Metadata prepared for a future Zenodo archive. No deposit has been created or reserved.
